GeneralDescription.SourceString: A self-taught expert in stealth and style.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: A self-taught expert in stealth and style.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Hired to investigate the explorers of the jungle, stealth expert Nia isn't afraid of a challenge. But without knowing the identity of her client, she's not quite sure what she's looking for...
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Hired to investigate the explorers of the jungle, stealth expert Nia isn't afraid of a challenge. But without knowing the identity of her client, she's not quite sure what she's looking for...
